data.text: M04/P04 FELISIAN WITH A BETTER COUNTENANCE. AT AT 9.77 AND 24.77
IT'S QUITE HILLY WITH UNUSUAL GROUND- QUARTZ DIET AGAIN. AT 0.006
AND IT WAS COLD, BARREN AND SLIGHTLY HILLY WITH A HOPPER; 116.13
WAS THE SAME GROUND WITH VERY TALL MESAS WITH ATTENDANT FROZEN
CORRECTION:MESA OBJECTS AT 359.116- MY NOTES WERE WRONG.SKINNYMON
